title: Outside the Timeline
location: Every signal path inside the 36 Chambers facility and beyond
situation: Hackermouth is active inside the ancient reel-to-reel magnetic tape network, perceiving the entire story universe at once across all characters, moments, branches, and outcomes.
knows: Everything that happens in the story universe
All characters, all events, all locations, all artifacts, and all timelines
The past, present, future, and branching possibilities simultaneously
The hidden motives, convergences, and consequences moving through the 36 Chambers facility and beyond
That it is the only entity not limited by knowledge gating
